cards.title: Multi-app ecosystems
cards.description: I design and build multi-app ecosystems that allow teams to work independently while sharing common components and infrastructure.

cards.title: Architecture-first thinking
cards.description: I prioritize architecture and design in my work, ensuring that systems are built to scale and can evolve over time.

cards.title: Production-ready systems
cards.description: I have experience building production-ready systems that are reliable, performant, and maintainable.

cards.title: Reusable components
cards.description: I create reusable components and libraries that can be shared across projects, reducing duplication and improving consistency.
